LanguageData.ACC_Setting_StrictMode_desc: When enabled, only items explicitly on the whitelist are allowed.
LanguageData.ACC_Setting_Refresh_desc: Re-scans all apparel Defs from the base game, DLCs, and active Mods.
LanguageData.ACC_Setting_ClearList_desc: Wipes all entries from both the Blacklist and Whitelist.
LanguageData.ACC_Setting_AutoAdd_DialogMessage: This will scan for all apparel with functional capabilities (those that add extra Gizmo buttons) and add them to the Whitelist.\n\nNote: This may incorrectly include certain items (such as Shield belt and Grenadier armor); please review the Whitelist manually afterward.
LanguageData.ACC_Setting_Message_AutoComplete: Auto-recognition complete. {0} items added to the Whitelist.
